creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
roam        2007-01-26 13:23:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/curlpp           Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Removed files:
    ftp/curlpp/files     patch-curlpp::Info.cpp 
  Log:
  Update to curlpp-0.7.0.
  In addition to the patch from Vasil, also finally remove the warning
  about the incompatibility with ancient curlpp versions.
  
  PR:             108295
  Submitted by:   vd
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
